body:
## Summary

Recompiles the six execute-pipe plays — implement, validate, launch, fix-bug, refactor,
deploy — onto the Level 3 pattern already piloted on the four end-sequence plays in Batch
A. Done means is now derived from each play's existing done bar; C0 stop-condition gates
plus session identity stamps were added to all six; checkpoints are classed, with pinning
applied where each play's own intent already mandates the gate — implement's
spec-approval checkpoint, fix-bug's human approval gate, and launch's #436 human sign-off
walk are all `pinned` (no config value can turn them off). deploy gained a NEW
config-switched one-way-door confirm checkpoint that didn't exist before this batch.

A handful of existing play scripts were extended to write machine fields instead of
prose, so the stop-condition gate can read them directly: refactor's behavior-preservation
check, validate's stamped-verdict flag, and launch's gate-resolution outcome. deploy's
verify-capture is new work in this batch. `gate-config.md` picked up the pinned-gates rule
that documents this behavior.

## Self-Review Checklist

Rules resolved from: `/Users/kapilahuja/.garura/core/memory/standards/rules/self-review.md`
(base, no project override)

### Scope checks

- **Matches the issue.** PASS. All 38 changed files are the six recompiled plays, four
  existing play scripts extended for machine fields, the gate-config.md pinned-gates
  addition, and STM context/run-record artifacts for #466. Nothing outside this footprint.
- **No scope creep.** PASS. No unrelated files touched.
- **Reasonable size.** PASS with note. 2,421 insertions is large for one sitting, but it's
  six structurally-identical play recompiles (each diff is the same shape) plus a small
  standards addition.
- **No stray artifacts.** PASS. No commented-out blocks or debug prints. STM context files
  are the expected run-record artifacts for this issue.

### Quality checks

- **Tests present.** PASS (mechanical verification in place of unit tests — this is a
  play/recipe change). Ran `lint_play.py` against all 11 plays now on the Level 3
  pattern (5 Batch A + 6 Batch B) — all return `VERDICT: PASS (0 gap(s))`.
- **Checker copies byte-identical.** PASS — verified via `md5` across all six plays'
  `scripts/check_stop_condition.py` and `scripts/session_stamp.py`: single hash each,
  no differences across any pair.
- **Commits are clean.** PASS. Conventional format, all reference #466.
- **No secrets.** PASS. Grepped diff for api-key/secret/password/token patterns — no
  credential values, only legitimate prose hits.
- **Docs in step.** PASS. `gate-config.md` documents the pinned-gates behavior in the
  same commit set as the behavior itself.
- **Nothing obviously broken.** PASS. No TODOs or known-failing paths introduced.

### Verdict

**PASS — 0 FAIL, 0 blocking findings.** 1 non-blocking note (size, explained by
structural repetition across six plays). Cleared to raise.

Refs #466

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commits.messageBody:
Self-review pass for Batch B (execute-pipe plays on the Level 3 model):
lint PASS on all 11 converted plays, checker copies byte-identical,
pinned gates and machine-field script extensions verified against the
diff.

title: feat(components): Batch B — execute pipe on the Level 3 model (#466)
